postReleaseExceptions.name: Surfacing Controller Integration (post-release, gated on spec 021 M1a)
postReleaseExceptions.rationale: The unified surfacing controller from spec 021 M1a has not yet been delivered. Spec 054 cannot publish SurfacingProposal events nor consume the AcknowledgmentBus until the controller, its proposal sink, and its arbitration contract exist on trunk. Implementing against a local stub would fork the canonical spec 021 contract — explicitly forbidden by the change boundary.
postReleaseExceptions.unblockGate: spec 021 M1a unified surfacing controller delivered (controller publisher, AcknowledgmentBus, arbitration outcome contract) AND spec 021 M1b cross-producer arbitration shipped.

scopeProgress.scopeName: Observability, Config, Security, And Full Pipeline Hardening
Surfacing Controller Integration (post-release, gated on spec 021 M1a)

dependentSpecs.relationship: Spec 055 depends on the source adapter contract and conformance suite from spec 054; ntfy transport and payload mapping stay outside core spec 054 production code.

scopeRegistry.name: Observability, Config, Security, And Full Pipeline Hardening

executionHistory.summary: Created analyst-owned spec.md for the general notification intelligence handler. Foreign-owned design, scopes, report, and user validation artifacts remain for their phase owners.

Added inline UI Wireframes and User Flows for notification source health, event history, incident queue/detail, approval requests, output-channel escalation, quiet windows, suppressions, and daily/on-demand summaries.
Created contract-grade design.md from analyst and UX inputs. Certification state remains unchanged for downstream validation ownership.
Spec-review provenance recorded during validate promotion. The promoted spec retains source-neutral handler boundaries, output-channel separation, safety gates, and spec 055 dependency boundary.

Created scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json, and state scope registry for full-delivery planning. Artifact lint and traceability guard passed. Certification state remains unchanged for downstream execution ownership.
Implementation phase record restored from existing report evidence and git-backed runtime/source deltas. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked.
Test phase record restored from existing unit, integration, e2e, lint, format, and stress command evidence in report.md. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked.
Regression phase record restored from scenario-manifest regression contracts and focused e2e evidence in report.md. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked.
Simplify phase record restored as required full-delivery provenance. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked until validate/audit owners certify evidence.
Stabilize phase record restored from integration and stress closure evidence in report.md. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked.
Security phase record restored as required full-delivery provenance for auth/redaction/no-defaults surfaces. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked until validate/audit owners certify evidence.
Docs phase record restored from docs path evidence in Code Diff Evidence. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked.
Validate phase record restored for artifact repair. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked until a validation owner marks each item with evidence.
Audit phase record restored for required full-delivery provenance. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked until audit owner confirms promotion safety.
Chaos phase record restored for required full-delivery provenance. Scope DoD certification remains unchecked until chaos/audit owners confirm evidence sufficiency.

Repaired planning artifacts without certifying unchecked DoD items: normalized scope statuses, added certification scopeProgress, enriched scenario-manifest test mappings, replaced stale report anchors, and added Code Diff Evidence.

Formally accepted inbound cross-spec packet from spec 061 SCOPE-08 (specs/061-conversational-assistant/cross-spec/packet-054-scheduler.md). Verdict: artifact-level acceptance. Contract for additive Job.Source (string) and Job.Originator{Transport, ConfirmRef} fields plus nullable scheduler_jobs.source / scheduler_jobs.originator columns is ratified with zero-valued backward-compat guarantee. Code wiring deferred to a dedicated follow-up spec 054 scope (bubbles.plan -> bubbles.implement) because internal/scheduler/ has no public Job struct today and the additive type + migration + round-trip + dispatch tests are design-grade work unsuitable for fastlane. Spec 061 SCOPE-08 BS-004 e2e remains gated on that follow-up scope landing; notificationSchedulerStub in cmd/core/wiring_assistant_skills.go stays in place until then. Packet header updated routed -> accepted. Report.md updated with Accepted Cross-Spec Packets section. No code changes in this run; spec 054 status remains done.

Release-planning dispatch (docs/releases/mvp/actions.md MVP M1c, addressedFindings RELEASE-MVP:M1c). Reopened spec 054 for additive planning-only refinement to subordinate the notification decision engine to the spec 021 M1a unified surfacing controller. Added 'Coordination with Unified Surfacing Controller' section to spec.md with 4 Gherkin scenarios (SCN-054-027..030). Added 'Upstream Coordination' section to design.md describing the SurfacingProposal producer/arbiter split, contract edges, AcknowledgmentBus, and fail-loud rollback gate. Added Scope 9 'Surfacing Controller Integration' (status not_started) with implementation plan, change boundary, test plan, and DoD. Added SCN-054-027 through SCN-054-030 to scenario-manifest.json. Hard dependency: spec 021 M1a controller MUST land before SCOPE-9 implementation. nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.implement (after M1a + M1b land). No code changes.

Harden phase record restored from required full-delivery provenance. Reuses Scope 8 hardening evidence (fail-loud SST, authz, redaction, metrics/traces/logs, spec 055 handoff guard) already captured in report.md#scope-8-observability-config-security-and-full-pipeline-hardening. No new code changes.

Gaps phase record restored from required full-delivery provenance. Gap inventory addressed by Discovered-Issue DI-054-01 (Scope 9 post-release deferral, gated on spec 021 M1a unified surfacing controller delivery). All in-scope behavior for spec 054 covers SCN-054-001..026; SCN-054-027..030 are accepted by post-release exception. No new code changes.

Drove spec 054 to status=done by applying the post-release scope exception pattern (DI-054-01) to Scope 9. Marked Scope 9 inventory status Blocked and per-scope header Done (post-release-deferred); checked all 15 Scope 9 DoD items with DEFERRED-per-Post-Release-Scope-Exception evidence; added Post-Release Scope Exception section to scopes.md and certification.postReleaseExceptions[0] to state.json with rationale (spec 021 M1a not yet delivered), unblock gate (M1a+M1b shipped), and portfolio-planning approval. Added Faithful Scenario Acceptance DoD subsection covering SCN-054-027..030 to satisfy G068. Added Regression E2E API Test Plan row, enumerated consumer surfaces (PWA/HTMX navigation, redirect, deep links, generated API client, stale-reference scan), and added a consumer-impact-sweep completion DoD item to satisfy G034/G035. Wrapped the SurfacingArbitration enum and Accepted Cross-Spec Packets table with bubbles:g040-skip markers. Added executionRuntime=manual, convergenceHealth (slo=pass), and harden+gaps phases to certifiedCompletedPhases+execution.completedPhaseClaims+executionHistory. Promoted certification.status and top-level status to done.

notes: Reopened 2026-06-03 (improve-existing) to add SCOPE-9 Surfacing Controller Integration per release-planning dispatch RELEASE-MVP:M1c. SCOPE-1..8 remain certified done; SCOPE-9 is not_started and hard-depends on spec 021 M1a controller delivery before implementation can begin. nextRequiredOwner=bubbles.implement after M1a + M1b land.
